title: f1le
description: An horror mod that has an theme of an broken datapack.
body:
![f1le Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45526f5dc42b0535fed3eef9e3860255d301a5e1.png)
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

You're bored. Minecraft hasn't gotten an update for 6 months now. Your friends tell you to download mods, you don't like mods! You're desperately searching for something. Something that adds stuff to Minecraft without mods or custom clients... and you found it. A shady Russian Minecraft website called Minecraft-inside.ru. This site has something called Minecraft Insider, datapacks that add stuff to Minecraft. You download it.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

SPOILERS BELOW!

All of mods events: 

"night", "lava", "shake", "kick", "bsod", "nuker", "shuffle", "shrink", 
"stare", "spy", "forceattack", "fakejoin", "mimic", "stevefilling", 
"chunklock", "killmobs", "diamondtrap", "grace", "notch", "doorspam","footsteps" 

This mod CAN NOT and WILL NOT touch your computer.

This mod requires Microsoft Windows and Linux/Mac OS support is not coming. Mod uses Windows APIs.

If you have epileptic history, please do not play this mod. It has a lot of flashin' lights!

Mod inspired by m0dfile, an underrated horror mod!!
(https://discord.gg/H5EXbbtqHP)]
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
![Discord Link Up](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29e23edc45c6cc75f1f252013d720b526cc2f657.png)
